# getascraper/how-to-scrape-biorxiv

> how-to-scrape-biorxiv is an Apify actor that extracts structured data from bioRxiv and medRxiv.
> Built with TypeScript. Free tier available.

## Overview
- bioRxiv and medRxiv scraper and data extraction API
- Extracts: title, authors, abstract, doi, category, pdf_url
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-biorxiv/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/devanshlive/biorxiv-medrxiv-rag-extractor

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-biorxiv/blob/main/README.md
- REST API: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-biorxiv/blob/main/README.md

## Pricing
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month
- Starter: Contact for pricing
- Business: Contact for pricing

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-biorxiv/issues
- Apify Discord: https://discord.gg/apify
